items.title: 2027-2031 Capital Improvement Plan (CIP) (Resolution/Roll Call Vote)
items.summary: consider the City of Campbell 2027-2031 Capital Improvement Plan (CIP) for citywide projects for consistency with the Campbell 2040 General Plan.

items.title: Campbell Technology Park Project DEIR Public Hearing
items.summary: receive comments from the public on the focused Draft Environmental Impact Report (DEIR) prepared for the proposed Campbell Technology Park Project, on property located at 635, 655, 675, and 695 Campbell Technology Parkway. The proposed project is a 290-unit residential development consisting of 27 two-story single-family detached homes, 149 three-story townhome-style condominium units across 28 buildings, and 114 four-story townhome-style condominium units across 15 buildings. The project would demolish four existing on-site structures totaling approximately 280,864 square-feet and redevelop the site with residential uses and associated improvements, including utility and infrastructure upgrades, landscaping, construction of a new stormwater drainage system, and off-site improvements.

items.title: Notice of Public Hearing - FY2026-27 Schedule of Fees and Charges
items.summary: an amendment to the City's Fiscal Year 2026-27 Schedule of Fees and Charges. Information is available which provides the amount of cost, or estimated cost, required to provide the services for which the fees or service charges are levied.

items.title: Notice of Public Hearing - Business License Ordinance_Tax FY 2026-2027
items.summary: adoption of the Ordinance amending provisions of the Campbell Municipal Code to officially revise the business license tax rates for Fiscal Year 2027.

items.title: 278 E Campbell Avenue – Conditional Use Permit (Resolution/Roll Call Vote)
items.summary: consider the application of Fatih Ulas to allow the on-site sale of beer and wine in association with a quick service restaurant (dba Sultan's Kebab) on property located at 278 E Campbell Avenue. The application under consideration includes a Conditional Use Permit.

items.title: 278 E Campbell Ave - Request to allow on-site sale of beer & wine
items.summary: 278 E Campbell Ave - Request to allow on-site sale of beer & wine

items.title: 750 E. McGlincy Ln., Ste. 102. – Conditional Use Permit (Resolution/Roll Call Vote)
items.summary: consider the application of CUONG TRINH, PHARM.D., Inc., dba Wellness Pharmacy to allow ancillary retail (pharmacy) sales serving a pharmaceutical compounding and prescription fulfillment laboratory, on property located at 750 E. McGlincy Ln., Ste. 102. The application under consideration includes a Conditional Use Permit.

items.title: Notice of Public Hearing -700 W. Hamilton Ave.
items.summary: adopting a Resolution, approving a Major Housing Development Project Permit to allow construction of a 173-unit housing development project, consisting of 89 townhome-style condominium units across eight (8) four-story buildings, and 84 podium-style condominium units housed within a single five-story building along with the removal and replacement of associated site and landscaping improvements; and a Vesting Tentative Subdivision Map to subdivide the property, establish public and/or private easements, and provide for necessary public right-of-way dedications; and preparation of a final phasing plan for the entire project site.

items.title: 276 E Campbell Ave - request to allow live entertainment
items.summary: Zoning | Area Plan: CC-MU | DDP Neighborhood Association(s): DCNA Request to allow live entertainment, limited to disc jockey (DJ) and live band performances, ending at 11:00 PM, daily, conducted in association

items.title: 480 E Hamilton Ave - 557 Salmar Ave - review of operations of Hardware Store and Garden Center

items.title: Notice of Public Hearing - 2025 Building Code Update
items.summary: an Ordinance adopting the 2025 California Building Code series (Building, Residential, Fire, Administrative, Existing, Historical, Energy, Cal Green, Mechanical, Electrical, Plumbing, Wildland-Urban Interface) and amending Titles 1 (General Provisions), 5 (Business License), 17 (Fire Protection), 18 (Building Codes and Regulations) of the Campbell Municipal Code.

items.title: Notice of Public Hearing - Business License Tax Fiscal Year 2025-26
items.summary: adoption of the Ordinance amending provisions of the Campbell Municipal Code to officially revise the business license tax rates for Fiscal Year 2026.

items.title: Notice of Public Hearing - 480 E. Hamilton Ave
items.summary: the request of Scott A. Mommer Consulting to modify the operational characteristics of an existing 102,332 square-foot hardware store with an 18,705 square-foot garden center (The Home Depot), including legalizing existing unpermitted outdoor merchandise storage and adding additional outdoor merchandise storage areas on property located at 480 E. Hamilton Avenue. Staff is recommending that this project be deemed Categorically Exempt under CEQA.
